problem: Multi-pass shaders write intermediate data to dataTextureA/B, but subsequent passes read from dataTextureC expecting automatic copies that don't happen
fix_strategy: Option 1 - Change Pass 2+ to read from where the previous pass actually wrote

changes.change: Pass 2 now reads volumetric data from dataTextureA (where Pass 1 wrote)

fixed_shader_chains.data_flow: Pass 1 writes to dataTextureA → Pass 2 reads from dataTextureA
fixed_shader_chains.note: Temporal history feedback still uses dataTextureC (correct for feedback effects)

changes.change: Pass 2 now reads volumetric data from dataTextureA (where Pass 1 wrote)

fixed_shader_chains.data_flow: Pass 1 writes to dataTextureA → Pass 2 reads from dataTextureA
fixed_shader_chains.note: Temporal history feedback still uses dataTextureC (correct for feedback effects)

changes.change: Pass 2 now reads field data from dataTextureA (where Pass 1 wrote)
Pass 3 now reads particle data from dataTextureB (where Pass 2 wrote)
Glow sampling now reads from dataTextureB (where Pass 2 wrote)

fixed_shader_chains.data_flow: Pass 1 writes to dataTextureA → Pass 2 reads A, writes B → Pass 3 reads B
fixed_shader_chains.note: Temporal history feedback in Pass 2 still uses dataTextureC (correct for feedback effects)

changes.change: Pass 1 now initializes velocity from curl noise instead of reading non-existent data from dataTextureC
changes.before: Read from dataTextureC (previous velocity field) + advection

changes.change: Glow sampling now reads from dataTextureB (where Pass 2 wrote density)
Scattering samples now read from dataTextureB (where Pass 2 wrote density)

fixed_shader_chains.data_flow: Pass 1 initializes velocity → writes A → Pass 2 reads A, advects density → writes B → Pass 3 reads B
fixed_shader_chains.known_issue: Pass 2 reads density from dataTextureC for advection feedback loop, but no B→C copy exists. Density will accumulate from mouse/ripple sources each frame but won't advect from previous frame's density.

notes: Fixed 7 shader files across 4 multi-pass chains
Pass 1 shaders were already correct - they write to dataTextureA
The issue was Pass 2+ shaders reading from dataTextureC instead of where previous pass wrote
Temporal history reads (for feedback effects) still use dataTextureC as designed
sim-fluid-feedback-field-pass1 was reading from empty dataTextureC - now initializes from curl noise
All data chains now properly connect: A→Pass2 or A→Pass2→B→Pass3
sim-fluid-feedback-field has a remaining issue: Pass 2 expects B→C copy for density feedback loop

data_texture_convention.dataTextureA: Pass 1 output, readable by Pass 2+ (storage, write; loadable by subsequent passes)
data_texture_convention.dataTextureB: Pass 2 output, readable by Pass 3+ (storage, write; loadable by subsequent passes)
data_texture_convention.dataTextureC: Read-only sampleable texture for temporal feedback/history (requires explicit copy to be populated)

renderer_requirements_for_full_fix: For sim-fluid-feedback-field to work with density advection feedback, renderer needs B→C copy between frames
Alternative: Shaders could be redesigned to use dataTextureA for ping-pong feedback (read A, write A)
